scripts.dev: concurrently -n fe,be -c blue,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd apps/backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.restart: npm run stop && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: cd apps/frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && uv sync
